# EXIF Remover

> A privacy-focused EXIF viewer and remover for inspecting photo metadata and stripping GPS location, camera details, dates, and other embedded data.

Canonical URL: https://exif-remover.vercel.app/
Chinese URL: https://exif-remover.vercel.app/zh/

## What it does

- Read EXIF metadata
- Detect GPS location data
- Warn about privacy-sensitive metadata
- Remove embedded metadata
- Compare file size before and after cleanup
- Process images locally in the browser

## Best for

- Remove GPS data before sharing photos
- Inspect camera metadata
- Clean image files for publishing
- Reduce privacy risk in uploaded photos

## Privacy

This tool is designed for browser-based processing whenever possible. User-provided content is not stored by Dudu Tools.

## FAQ

### What is EXIF data?

EXIF data is metadata embedded in image files, often including camera model, capture date, exposure settings, and GPS coordinates.

### Why remove EXIF metadata?

EXIF can reveal private details such as where a photo was taken. Removing it helps protect privacy before sharing images.

### Will removing EXIF reduce image quality?

The image may be re-encoded, but the tool uses quality settings intended to preserve visual quality.

### Are my photos uploaded?

No. Metadata inspection and cleanup happen in your browser.
